reasoning: Average daily temperatures in Ajaccio in early November (approx 14.5°C) are historically much higher than those in January or February (approx 9-10°C). The probability of a mid-winter day exceeding an early November day's temperature is statistically around 0.06 based on historical distributions. If the question requires it to be higher on multiple resolution dates, this joint probability drops further. Hence, a forecast of 0.04 reflects the low likelihood of this inversion occurring (or occurring across multiple dates).
